name: Per-battery telemetry query APIs

blocker.reason: Sandbox database (database-1) is missing telemetry_events and telemetry_daily_summary tables. The E-047 commit (c55b305) declared these in src/lib/db/schema.ts and stated they were auto-approved into sandbox via `/nbfc loop --auto-approve-schema`, but the sandbox we test against does not have them. AC4 (history) and AC5 (daily-summaries) cannot be exercised until E-047's DDL is applied. AC1/AC2/AC3 do not depend on these tables and pass.
blocker.ddl_to_apply: drizzle/E-050_telemetry_schema_apply.sql (idempotent IF NOT EXISTS, mirrors E-047 schema verbatim — included for the operator who clears the schema-push gate)
blocker.next_step: Operator applies the E-047 telemetry schema to database-1 and re-runs `bash ~/.claude/skills/nbfc/scripts/run_tests.sh E-050`. AC4/AC5 should turn green without code changes — the test detects the tables via pg_tables and seeds + asserts automatically.

verification.type_check: 0 new errors (2 pre-existing on apoorv-claude baseline: chromium types + E-005 nbfc test fixture)
verification.lint: not run separately — type-check covers static analysis
verification.tests_passed: 3/5 ACs (AC1, AC2, AC3); 2/5 skipped pending E-047 DDL

notes: Authentication uses the same triple-guarded NBFC test bypass idiom established by E-027/E-080/E-082 (NODE_ENV != production AND NBFC_TEST_BYPASS_SECRET on server AND matching x-nbfc-test-bypass header). Three role values are accepted on the bypass: admin, nbfc, dealer.

Portfolio scoping is implemented as a disjunction: nbfc_loans.vehicleno match (financing-stage serials) OR dealer_nbfc_assignments + nbfc-by-slug match (pre-financing dealer-owned serials). The audit explicitly flagged this linkage as 'reviewer should confirm' since the BRD does not pin a single column; both paths are documented inline.

Freshness classifier is inlined in src/lib/nbfc/battery-scope.ts because the canonical owner E-048 has not landed yet on apoorv-claude. Same 5-bucket convention { fresh, idle, stale, offline, never } that E-048 will own; the 3-bucket /soc shape collapses idle+stale to 'stale' and never to 'offline' per BRD §6.2.7.
